soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed formula for eta_w^dagger minimizes only over LP support angles, but Section 6 defines eta_w^dagger over all active-set first-order candidates without the global support constraint.

soundness_flags.label: Corollary diagonal-contact
soundness_flags.one_line: The claim that no exposed LP maximizer has pure-diagonal contact implies eta_w^dagger=+infty does not follow, because eta_w^dagger may be attained by a non-exposed active-set candidate in mathfrak C_w(P).

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal genuinely widens the parent eta=0 independent-cumulant diagonalization premise to an eta-bounded co-kurtosis leakage class and includes the required eta=0 parent reduction.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Split notation into an active-set residual over all stationary candidates and a support-face residual over M_w(P), then state Conjecture 1 as the condition under which they coincide.
Patch the diagonal-contact corollary by quantifying over all candidates in mathfrak C_w(P), or rewrite it in terms of eta_w^*(P) rather than eta_w^dagger(P).
For Conjecture 2, add explicit dominance inequalities excluding lower-residual non-support stationary angles on both O(2) components.

recommended_next_step: Revise the eta_w^dagger definitions and sanity corollaries so the active-set certificate and global support-face frontier use consistent quantifiers.
